sub_groupings.name: Anxiety and Mood Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Disorders characterized by disturbances in mood and anxiety

sub_groupings.name: Delusional Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions marked by persistent false beliefs (delusions) without loss of reality contact

sub_groupings.name: Developmental and Childhood Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Disorders emerging in early development or childhood

sub_groupings.name: Dementia and Cognitive Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving progressive cognitive decline and dementia symptoms

sub_groupings.name: Dissociative and Identity Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Disorders involving disruptions in consciousness and identity

sub_groupings.name: Impulse Control and Psychotic Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions marked by impaired impulse control or psychosis

sub_groupings.name: Neurocognitive and Organic Mental Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Disorders caused by brain dysfunction or injury

sub_groupings.name: Sleep and Psychophysiological Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving sleep disturbances or psychosomatic symptoms

sub_groupings.name: Psychosocial and Acculturation Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions related to psychosocial stressors or cultural adaptation

sub_groupings.name: Psychotic Disorders with Special Features
sub_groupings.description: Conditions with unique psychotic manifestations or associations

sub_groupings.name: Diagnostic Classification Systems
sub_groupings.description: Frameworks for mental health diagnosis and assessment

sub_groupings.name: Delusional Disorders with Specific Content
sub_groupings.description: Delusional conditions with distinct thematic content

sub_groupings.name: Other Mental & Behavioral Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous or less commonly categorized mental health conditions
